title: Language Learning Starter Kit
key_points: Use short context snippets for each new word.
Pair each term with one example sentence.
Ask learners to explain meaning in their own words.
Use quiz feedback to prioritize weak terms.
practice_prompts: Define retrieval grounding in one sentence.
Write a simple example sentence for a new technical word.
Create one multiple-choice question with one clearly correct option.
Explain how to revisit missed words without overwhelming the learner.
